heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyThe Guroja service takes your personal information very seriously and handles your personal information with special care. Your personal information is used only for the smooth provision of Guroja services. The Guroja service will not provide your personal information to any third party unless otherwise provided by law or otherwise agreed to by the customer. In order to protect your personal information, Guroja Service has established the following privacy policy.

This information and functionality is essential to provide services that enable users to connect and interact with people from different regions, genders, and ages. Meanwhile, Guroja services are constantly striving to maintain a pleasant and healthy user experience and to provide a beneficial experience for all users. For this purpose, information such as records of use and related evidence may be collected through victims' reports or automated systems in order to prevent illegal use that may harm other users against laws or terms of service. In addition, for in-app purchases, payment providers such as Google Play and the App Store are collecting billing information, such as credit card information, carrier information, and voucher number. In connection with payment, the user must take responsibility for his / her own understanding of the terms of use and privacy policy of the payment companies.
